seo.h1: Naval Hydrostatics & Stability Calculator & Engineering Guide - AluCalc
seo.intro: Analysis of ship stability and buoyancy including transverse/longitudinal metacentric height calculations.
pitfalls: Ignoring free surface effect of tanks
seo.step_by_step:
1. Define system parameters for Naval Hydrostatics & Stability.
2. Consult the technical reference table for material constants.
3. Apply the IMO Code on Intact Stability formula.
4. Run the post-calculation design checks.
seo.practical: In Mechanical applications, accurate Naval Hydrostatics & Stability analysis is vital for safety and performance.
